channel.title: GitHub Enterprise Server on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in GitHub Enterprise Server on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 is now generally available. The release adds improvements in deployment efficiency, monitoring, code security, and policy management, including organization custom properties now generally available.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 release candidate is available
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise Server 3.21 release candidate is available. The release focuses on deployment efficiency, monitoring, code security, and policy management, with organization custom properties now generally available.

  • Source: GitHub

item.title: github: GitHub Enterprise Server 3.20 is now generally available
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise Server 3.20 is generally available. The release focuses on deployment efficiency, monitoring, code security, and policy management, with an improved merge experience among the highlighted changes.

  • Source: GitHub
